violations.description: Backflow prevention. — --Plumbing system was not installed to preclude backflow of a solid, liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply system. -Raise drain pipe on ice machine so it sits above the plain of the floor drain.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors and floor drains need more thorough cleaning.
